Server exposes 24 tools — large attack surface without per-tool permission controls
Tool "linear_auth_callback" uses vague action words (handle) without specific operations. LLMs will interpret this as the broadest possible action.
Tool "linear_bulk_update_issues" uses vague action words (update) without specific operations. LLMs will interpret this as the broadest possible action.
Tool "linear_get_user" references user without specifying scope boundaries. LLM will attempt to access the broadest possible scope.
Tool "linear_delete_issue" description is only 15 chars. LLM will hallucinate capabilities based on the name alone.
Tool "linear_update_comment" uses vague action words (update) without specific operations. LLMs will interpret this as the broadest possible action.
Tool "linear_delete_comment" description is only 17 chars. LLM will hallucinate capabilities based on the name alone.
Tool "linear_resolve_comment" description is only 18 chars. LLM will hallucinate capabilities based on the name alone.
Tool "linear_update_project_milestone" uses vague action words (update) without specific operations. LLMs will interpret this as the broadest possible action.
